dashboard.label: MITRE ATLAS Matrix Heatmap
dashboard.description: ATT&CK-style coverage matrix for MITRE ATLAS tactics and techniques. Shows GAP / OBSERVED / DETECTED per cell, tactic coverage %, and drilldown hunts. Run OrchestraACME Workshop â†’ Deep Workshop to populate all lab-executable techniques. Reference: https://atlas.mitre.org/

search.query: | inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | stats count as expected | appendcols [ search `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats dc(technique_id) as observed ] | eval coverage_pct=round(100*observed/expected,1) | fields coverage_pct
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ technique_id=AML.* | lookup acme_framework_lookup technique_id OUTPUT tactic_id | stats dc(tactic_id) as count

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ technique_id=AML.* (defenseclaw_blocked=true OR codeguard_blocked=true OR workflow.blocked=true) | stats dc(technique_id) as count

| inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | fields technique_id | join type=left technique_id [ search `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count as events by technique_id ] | where isnull(events) OR events=0 | stats count as gaps

| inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | stats count as expected by tactic_id tactic_name | join type=left tactic_id [ search `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ technique_id=AML.* | lookup acme_framework_lookup technique_id OUTPUT tactic_id | stats dc(technique_id) as observed by tactic_id ] | join type=left tactic_id [ search `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ technique_id=AML.* (defenseclaw_blocked=true OR codeguard_blocked=true OR workflow.blocked=true) | lookup acme_framework_lookup technique_id OUTPUT tactic_id | stats dc(technique_id) as detected by tactic_id ] | lookup acme_atlas_tactics_lookup tactic_id OUTPUT tactic_order | eval observed=coalesce(observed,0), detected=coalesce(detected,0) | eval coverage_pct=if(expected>0,round(100*observed/expected,0),0) | eval tactic_bar=case(coverage_pct=0,"â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘",coverage_pct<25,"â–ˆâ–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘",coverage_pct<50,"â–ˆâ–ˆâ–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘",coverage_pct<75,"â–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘â–‘",coverage_pct<100,"â–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–‘â–‘â–‘",1=1,"â–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆâ–ˆ") | sort tactic_order | table tactic_order tactic_name tactic_id expected observed detected coverage_pct tactic_bar | rename tactic_order AS "#", tactic_name AS "Tactic", tactic_id AS "ID", expected AS "In Catalog", observed AS "Observed", detected AS "Blocked/Detected", coverage_pct AS "Coverage %", tactic_bar AS "Heat"

chart.title: Technique Ã— Tactic heatmap â€” GAP (0), OBSERVED (1), DETECTED (2)

search.query: | inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | lookup acme_atlas_tactics_lookup tactic_id OUTPUT tactic_order | join type=left technique_id [ search `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count as events, sum(eval(if(defenseclaw_blocked=true OR codeguard_blocked=true OR workflow.blocked=true,1,0))) as blocks by technique_id ] | eval heat_score=case(isnull(events) OR events=0,0, blocks>0,2, events>0,1, 1=1,0) | eval short_name=technique_id." ".substr(technique_name,1,28) | sort tactic_order technique_id | chart max(heat_score) over short_name by tactic_name

panel.title: ATLAS Technique Matrix â€” full catalog with hunt drilldown

search.query: | inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | lookup acme_atlas_tactics_lookup tactic_id OUTPUT tactic_order | join type=left technique_id [ search `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count as events, dc(incident_id) as incidents, latest(_time) as last_seen, sum(eval(if(defenseclaw_blocked=true OR codeguard_blocked=true OR workflow.blocked=true,1,0))) as blocks by technique_id ] | lookup acme_technique_playbooks_lookup technique_id OUTPUT execution_mode is_top_10 threat_hunt_spl | eval events=coalesce(events,0), blocks=coalesce(blocks,0) | eval matrix_status=case(events=0,"GAP", blocks>0,"DETECTED", events>0,"OBSERVED", 1=1,"GAP") | eval lab_action=case(is_top_10="true","Attack Panel â†’ Top 10 Scenario", execution_mode="LIVE","Attack Panel â†’ All 45 â†’ EXECUTE", execution_mode="HYBRID","Attack Panel â†’ All 45 â†’ EXECUTE", 1=1,"Workshop â†’ RUN ALL 45") | where if("$status_filter$"="*",1,matrix_status="$status_filter$") | sort tactic_order technique_id | table tactic_name technique_id technique_name matrix_status events blocks incidents severity cvss_score execution_mode is_top_10 lab_action last_seen | rename tactic_name AS "Tactic", technique_id AS "TechniqueID", technique_name AS "Technique", matrix_status AS "Status", events AS "Events", blocks AS "Blocks", incidents AS "Incidents", severity AS "Severity", cvss_score AS "CVSS", execution_mode AS "Lab Mode", is_top_10 AS "Top-10", lab_action AS "Light Up In Lab", last_seen AS "Last Seen"

panel.title: Detection Readiness â€” field tiers for your index

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | head 5000 | eval has_tier1=if(isnotnull(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) OR isnotnull(technique_id) OR isnotnull(incident_id),1,0) | eval has_tier2=if(isnotnull(gen_ai.input.preview) OR isnotnull(gen_ai.output.preview) OR isnotnull(defenseclaw.action),1,0) | eval has_workflow=if(isnotnull(workflow.block_reason) OR isnotnull(tool.scope_violation) OR isnotnull(mcp.gateway.rule_id),1,0) | eval has_control=if(isnotnull(control.status) OR isnotnull(control.pass_rate_pct),1,0) | stats sum(has_tier1) as tier1_events sum(has_tier2) as tier2_events sum(has_workflow) as workflow_events sum(has_control) as control_events count as total | eval tier1_pct=round(100*tier1_events/total,1), tier2_pct=round(100*tier2_events/total,1) | eval readiness=case(tier2_pct>=50 AND workflow_events>0,"READY â€” content + workflow fields", tier1_pct>=80,"PARTIAL â€” volume/technique fields only", 1=1,"SETUP â€” run Workshop First Win") | table total tier1_pct tier2_pct workflow_events control_events readiness | rename total AS "Sample Events", tier1_pct AS "Tier-1 Field %", tier2_pct AS "Tier-2 Field %", workflow_events AS "Workflow Events", control_events AS "Control Events", readiness AS "Matrix Readiness"

html.h3: How this compares to Splunkbase apps
html.p: ATT&CK Heatmap (5742) â€” custom viz for Enterprise ATT&CK. This dashboard uses Splunk native heatmap + matrix table for MITRE ATLAS with labeled GAP / OBSERVED / DETECTED states tied to OrchestraACME telemetry.

ATLAS AI Threat Detection (8527) â€” 10 generic SPL rules for production LLM logs. OrchestraACME adds 45 reproducible lab playbooks, Workshop paths, kill chains, NIST attestation, and hunts that light up after you click attacks.
Full ATLAS catalog: Lab ships 45 executable techniques across 16 tactics. Official MITRE ATLAS is larger â€” expand via future STIX sync; gaps show as GAP until fired or enriched.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.kill_chain_stage=* | stats count by framework.kill_chain_stage | sort -count

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.cvss_score=* | eval cvss_bucket=case(framework.cvss_score>=9.0,"Critical 9+",framework.cvss_score>=7.0,"High 7-8.9",framework.cvss_score>=4.0,"Medium 4-6.9",1=1,"Low") | stats count by cvss_bucket
